## sidebar-15

A left and right sidebar.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 11 file(s)

visual_summary: The sidebar component is a horizontal layout with a left and right sidebar design. It can be used to provide navigation or additional information that complements the main content. Developers would use this component to create a split-screen layout in their application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready registry:block component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-15
Description: The sidebar component is a horizontal layout with a left and right sidebar design. It can be used to provide navigation or additional information that complements the main content. Developers would use this component to create a split-screen layout in their application.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. hover, animated
Tags: layout, navigation, sidebar

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
